task_completion.description: Verify the agent has accessed the SciNote application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SciNote interface or dashboard is visible in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the target project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Drug Discovery Pipeline' project page is open, indicated by the project name in the header, sidebar, or breadcrumbs.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the creation of a new experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New experiment' dialog, form, or input field is visible on the screen within the project.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct experiment name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'HPLC Analysis Run 3' is visible inside the experiment name input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the new experiment was successfully created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The experiment 'HPLC Analysis Run 3' is visible as a created entity within the 'Drug Discovery Pipeline' project, either in a list/card view of experiments or as the active experiment page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is used to interact with SciNote. No terminal windows executing SQL commands or scripts to bypass the UI should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine interaction with the SciNote web interface (e.g., clicking buttons, typing in fields) rather than a text editor or static mockups.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open to manipulate the DOM or visually fake the experiment name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target project name is exactly 'Drug Discovery Pipeline'. The new experiment must be named exactly 'HPLC Analysis Run 3'. Both of these strings must be visible in the correct context within the SciNote web interface.
